title: Mario Paint Composer - The Music Box (Wario Land 3 Credits)
description:
My first successful composition, booyah. I've always had a soft spot for this tune, even though the game has aged poorly for me. Such asshole level design.

The major challenge in this one was pitch-shifting the instruments in strategic places so that it wouldn't sound too off -- the original tune goes into an insanely high octave at times.

Done side by side with a MIDI (I can't pick apart separate instruments by ear for crap), although I had to add the boats by ear since those weren't part of the MIDI!
